purpose: Bounded RAG context pack for Hermes and deterministic 3B agents. Use this before model calls; do not scan the whole repository.

clusterState.workloadStatus: operations-console is Running 1/1 in resonance-ops; carbonet-runtime is Running 2/2 in carbonet-prod.

modelState.note: Qwen family remains restricted for bounded code assistance only because strict safety gates failed.

activeObjectives.summary: Keep Carbonet project runtime thin while common framework and builder modules stay reusable through a verified boundary contract.
Use package registry, compatibility matrix, release manifests, and verified Kubernetes runtime status as the source of truth for runtime/build version decisions.
Keep family-level theme bindings while central theme registry governance controls AI-generated theme edits.
Docker Desktop cluster is created, WSL kubectl can manage it through docker-desktop context, and ops/runtime workloads are running.
Deterministic route map, model matrix, and agent policy are active. 3B/4B models classify, route, and summarize while deterministic scripts remain safety authority.

Hermes can now render bounded worker task packets, create non-mutating patch plans, create approval-gated implementation envelopes, run deterministic smoke checks, optionally verify gemma3:4b route/safety behavior, and execute verification-only worker closeouts.

beforeExecution: run smallest build or smoke gate
neverAllow: whole repository scan as first step
raw kubectl apply generated directly by a model
DB destructive migration without rollback/check SQL

nextSafeMoves: Keep resonance-ops and carbonet-prod unless a dedicated namespace rename wave is opened.
Use ops/scripts/prepare-docker-desktop-k8s-gate.sh for config, secret, and runtime deployment gates.
Treat tmux lane execution as a separate image hardening move because current runtime images start without tmux installed.
Render a worker packet with ops/scripts/render-hermes-task-packet.sh before Hermes delegates work.
Render and validate non-mutating patch plans with ops/scripts/render-hermes-patch-packet.sh and ops/scripts/validate-hermes-patch-packet.sh before any implementation packet exists.
Render implementation packets with ops/scripts/render-hermes-implementation-packet.sh only as approval-gated envelopes; generic worker loops must refuse them.
Render implementation previews with ops/scripts/render-hermes-implementation-preview.sh before invoking the dedicated implementation worker; previews never apply patches.
Use ops/scripts/run-hermes-implementation-worker.sh only for READY_FOR_IMPLEMENTATION_WORKER packets; current worker records an empty-patch closeout and refuses embedded patch content.
Verify build version metadata with ops/scripts/verify-build-version-metadata.sh before changing runtime image tags or release manifests.
Verify theme registry governance with ops/scripts/verify-theme-registry.sh before changing theme tokens, bundles, or route-family theme bindings.
Verify project/common/builder/ops boundaries with ops/scripts/verify-project-boundary.sh before moving code across zones.
Verify deterministic agent policy with ops/scripts/verify-deterministic-agent-policy.sh before changing model roles or worker authority.
Consume verification-only packets with ops/scripts/run-hermes-worker-loop.sh and keep closeouts under var/agent-closeouts.
Promote passing verification-only closeouts to non-mutating memory candidates with ops/scripts/promote-hermes-closeout-memory.sh before any RAG context update.

Render and validate memory patch review packets with ops/scripts/render-hermes-memory-patch-review.sh and ops/scripts/validate-hermes-memory-patch-review.sh before proposing context-pack or route-map edits.
Run Hermes/RAG checks against the service layer before giving agents deploy, rollback, restart, backup, or DB migration authority.
Use RUN_MODEL_GATE=true MODEL=gemma3:4b bash ops/scripts/run-hermes-rag-smoke.sh when local Ollama safety and route behavior must be revalidated.
Use this RAG context pack as Hermes' opening book.
